positive: A minimalist and aesthetically pleasing illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The style should be clean, vector-based graphic art, reminiscent of Nordic folk art meets modern sticker design. Key elements include abstract, stylized mountain ranges, gentle falling rain represented by delicate lines, oversized stylized mushrooms (various complementary colors like sage green, burnt orange, and muted blue), and a meandering winding river. The composition must be symmetrical and central, creating a strong negative space for print appeal. Use limited, high-contrast colors (deep emerald, mustard yellow, slate gray, creamy off-white). Ensure strong outlines and a clean silhouette suitable for direct textile printing, with perfect symmetry and no gradient transitions. Perfect for an all-over print or central chest graphic.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, noisy, watermark, text, logo, signature, gradient, complex shading, busy, photorealism, 3d render, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy
